title: PojavSMP
description: A modpack to work with pojav, light-weight modpack to improve performance and with some QOL mods to play in servers
body:
# PojavSMP a modpack to play with PojavLancher
### PojavSMP aims to be a performance and QOL modpack to play on servers smoothly with the PojavLauncher
## This modpack have
- Improved performance **(without Sodium)**
- Almost all Optifine features
- Voice chat
- Minimap / WorldMap
- Controller support
>   **(At least 1gb of alocated RAM, this is meant to work with pojav only)**
